title: Iconic Pizzería Las Cuartetas on Historic Avenida Corrientes in Buenos Aires City Argentina Landmark
description: Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires: A traveler captures a moment of reflection in the reflective glass of Las Cuartetas, one of the most storied pizzerias along the bustling Avenida Corrientes. The storefront glows with a vibrant red marquee and the iconic Coca-Cola script, standing as a testament to the city's long-standing culinary heritage and late-night social culture. Natural light illuminates the polished signage and the classic, institutional facade, framing the entrance where local life converges for a slice of traditional pizza. Through the window, the interior offers a glimpse into the warm, timeless atmosphere that defines the Buenos Aires gastronomy scene. The photograph utilizes a balanced perspective to draw the eye toward the central branding, effectively showcasing the intersection of urban architecture and culinary tradition. The distinct Obelisk motif integrated into the signage pays subtle homage to the city's most famous monument nearby. This scene serves as a critical document of how local institutions anchor the identity of urban corridors against the backdrop of constant modernization. The clean composition highlights the texture of the green marble columns and the precise, welcoming symmetry of the entrance. This image is a collaborative production by Samuel Jeffery and Audrey Bergner for Project 23.
